description: A slogan graphic with a warm, film-grain aesthetic. The photograph shows a large American flag waving on a pole at center, backlit by a soft pink-and-lavender dusk sky, with a range of blue mountains catching golden sunset light along the lower portion of the frame. A grain/vignette gives it a vintage 'analog film' look. Centered across the top in white serif typography is the two-line slogan 'America First.' (upright) and 'Americans First.' (italic), with a tiny faint circular DOL/government seal watermark just above. There is no other text. The tweet text refers to employment gains to American-born workers and cracking down on H-1B 'abuse'.
